candidate.objective: Versatile and safety-focused tradesperson and multi-discipline site worker with a proven track record across electrical trade assistance, drilling operations, rigging, tower construction, mechanical maintenance, and civil underground pipe laying. Joshua has worked on some of Australia's most significant resource projects, including the Ichthys LNG Project (UGL / Kentz), BHP Olympic Dam, Rio Tinto Amrun (SCEE), and the WestConnex Tunnel. Currently working as a Trainee Driller with Numac Drilling, with prior experience in surface and underground RC and diamond drilling with Mitchell Services. Holds BHP and Rio Tinto inductions, an HR licence, and a broad range of safety and operational certifications.

duties: Maintained a high level of safety compliance in accordance with JHAs, JSAs, SWIs, SMPs, and company safety procedures.
Participated in pre-shift toolbox meetings and assisted in preparing equipment for upcoming drilling operations.
Ensured all relevant safety procedures and practices were adhered to throughout drilling operations.
Assisted the driller in operating drilling and mud circulating equipment in accordance with the well programme and company procedures.
Completed rig maintenance and pre-start logging prior to every shift.
Reported findings and faults to the driller or shift boss, and performed equipment maintenance and repairs.
Gained experience in sonic drilling and geotechnical drilling techniques.
Operated boring rigs and trenchers to locate existing water, gas, and telephone lines prior to drilling commencement.
Operated soil sampling equipment including standard penetration spoons and undisturbed samplers.
Operated power auger drill rigs designed for shallow depth drilling and maintained adequate supply of spare parts.

employment.employer: Ice Engineering — BHP Olympic Dam SCM21 Shutdown
duties: Fabricated structural support systems for tradespersons.
Assisted mechanical fitters in fabricating bracket supports and cable tray.
Prepared all work reports and obtained sign-off from the work supervisor.
Contributed to team efforts by providing constructive input at site meetings.
Assisted mechanical fitters in inspecting, maintaining, and repairing pump feeders, jaw crushers, conveyor belts, and pumps.
Performed welding, cutting, and grinding of support brackets.
Designed, welded, and fabricated parts using mechanical plans.
Installed and replaced machinery, equipment, and parts using hand and power tools.
Disassembled, repaired, and reassembled defective equipment, and applied protective coatings to components.
Diagnosed engine problems in a variety of construction vehicles including cranes, dozers, excavators, and forklifts.
Worked from SWMS, JHAs, SWIs, and pre-start toolbox meetings.
Performed routine maintenance and repairs on thermal systems and heavy diesel equipment.
Gained experience in gantry crane operations.
Set up and operated a lathe, drill press, and grinder to make and repair parts.
Performed hydraulic equipment repairs and assisted in troubleshooting malfunctions to determine root cause.
Replaced worn and damaged components and assisted in reassembly and testing of repaired units.
Attended pre-start meetings and followed JHAs, SWMS, and JMPs according to plan and work scopes.
Worked across remote areas of Australia and followed all company policies and procedures.
Selected appropriate equipment such as cables, slings, chains, winches, and pulleys according to load weights and work schedules.
Tested rigging to ensure safety and reliability, and assisted other riggers during lifts.
Operated excavator and mini combo for civil earthworks.
Performed minor maintenance of civil loaders and machinery, including pre-starts and LOTO procedures.
Erected communication towers from the ground up, ranging from 20m to 200m masts.
Directed workers engaged in hoisting and moving loads, and controlled movement of heavy equipment through confined spaces.

employment.location: Various Sites — Cracow Gold Mine (QLD) and South 32 Cannington (QLD)
duties: Assisted driller with rig move and rig-down operations.
Loaded casing and tubing, and maintained the drill rig to operational standards.
Completed visual and mechanical pre-starts prior to every shift.
Assisted the driller in operating the drill rig for surface and underground drilling.
Mixed drilling muds and managed consumables and supplies.
Gained experience on Atlas Copco and Sandvik DE880HC rigs, and MDR700 underground rig.
Conducted navigation and directional drilling, diamond coring, and reverse circulation drilling.
Performed grouting, exploration drilling, and rotary mud drilling.
Carried out rig servicing and intense labour operations.

employment.employer: SCEE (Southern Cross Electrical Engineering) — WestConnex Tunnel
duties: Participated in pre-job meetings, safety meetings, and creation of safe work documents including SWIs and JHAs.
Performed earthing installation and installed lighting compartments.
Installed and modified cable trays, and assisted tradespeople with glanding and installing cable cleats.
Performed work in compliance with applicable safety rules and Australian standards.
Carried out civil underground pipe laying activities.

employment.employer: SCEE (Southern Cross Electrical Engineering) — Rio Tinto Amrun, Weipa
duties: Performed work in compliance with applicable safety rules and Australian standards.
Participated in pre-job meetings, safety meetings, and creation of SWIs and JHAs.
Assisted tradespeople with cable pulling via hand and winch, and with glanding and installing cable cleats.
Installed and modified cable trays.
Conducted civil underground pipe laying, reading and modifying civil conduit plans.
Performed civil blasting of holes for underground pipe and electrical earthing, and operated a blast and vacuum truck.
Interpreted plans and drawings, performed trenching, and laid stormwater, drainage, and sewage pipe underground.

employment.employer: Ice Engineering — BHP Olympic Dam Tails Leach Upgrade
duties: Performed work in compliance with applicable safety rules and Australian standards.
Used hand and power tools to reassemble equipment and replace worn or defective parts.
Assisted tradespeople with daily duties including cable removal and cable pulling via hand and winch.
Participated in pre-job meetings and safety meetings.
Installed and modified cable trays.
Carried out underground pipe laying and stormwater, sewage, and drainage pipe installation.
Read and understood construction drawings and plans.

employment.employer: UGL / Kentz Corp Ltd — Ichthys LNG Project, INPEX
duties: Operated and maintained plant, tools, and equipment in accordance with the operator's manual and good practice.
Performed work in compliance with applicable safety rules and Australian standards.
Problem-solved and carried out troubleshooting duties to resolve and pre-empt issues on site.
Assisted tradespeople with daily duties including cable removal and cable pulling via hand and winch.
Installed and modified cable trays and maintained high standards of workmanship throughout the project.
Ensured health and safety on site at all times, rapidly acquiring skills and demonstrating willingness to work varying rosters.
Rewarded with increased responsibility and autonomy due to strong performance and attention to safety.

skills.detail: Experienced Trainee Driller and Drillers Assistant with exposure to RC drilling, diamond coring, sonic drilling, geotechnical drilling, directional drilling, and underground drilling using Atlas Copco, Sandvik DE880HC, and MDR700 rigs.
Extensive trade assistant experience across major LNG, mining, and infrastructure projects including Ichthys LNG, BHP Olympic Dam, Rio Tinto Amrun, and the WestConnex Tunnel.
Skilled in underground pipe laying including stormwater, sewage, and drainage. Experienced in trenching, conduit installation, and blasting of civil earthing holes.
Experienced in rigging operations, tower erection from 20m to 200m, and operating rigging equipment including cables, slings, winches, and pulleys.
Operated excavators, mini combos, loaders, gantry cranes, lathes, drill presses, and grinders. Experienced in LOTO procedures and plant pre-start inspections.
Strong commitment to workplace safety. Competent in completing JHAs, SWMS, SWIs, pre-start checklists, and safe work documentation across multiple industry sectors.

certifications.details: Trade Certificate III in Painting and Decorating.
National Construction Induction Card — General Construction Induction.
Certified to test gas atmospheres for confined space and hazardous area entry.
Certified for work at heights including fall arrest and anchor point inspection.
First Aid and CPR certification — current.
Certified in rescue operations, similar to rigging rescue.
Certified in fire and injury prevention.
Certified for four-wheel drive vehicle operation in remote environments.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
